differential_diagnoses: Dabrafenib and trametinib-induced systemic inflammatory syndrome/drug-induced liver injury
Hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis (HLH) secondary to drug-induced toxicity
Systemic infection (occult source, e.g., fungal or atypical bacterial)
next_steps: Perform liver biopsy for histopathology and immunohistochemical staining
Order HLH workup (ferritin, triglycerides, fibrinogen, sCD25 levels)
Perform peripheral blood smear for intracellular inclusions (Morulae)
Obtain early morning cortisol and ACTH to evaluate for adrenal insufficiency
Magnetic resonance cholangiopancreatography (MRCP) to rule out biliary pathology
Send PCR/serology for Anaplasma and Babesia
Consider bone marrow biopsy if systemic inflammatory markers remain elevated
